content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 14, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 14, 2026, focused heavily on stabilizing the release pipeline. The team successfully resolved multiple classes of CI/CD failures, including issues with package publishing and concurrent release job conflicts, resulting in a stable `NPM Release` workflow on the `develop` branch.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Release Pipeline Stabilization**
* Implemented fixes to unblock release builds for published packages and ignore dirty plugin submodules during the publish process.
* Serialized the release workflow and added deduplication logic to prevent duplicate issue spam.
* Added retry logic for git pushes to handle non-fast-forward errors during release setup.

**Dependency and API Maintenance**
* Performed routine dependency updates across npm, yarn, cargo, and uv packages.
* Added diagnostic tools for plugin state drift to improve system observability.
* Introduced pipeline hooks and updated app-core to utilize `/api/agent/restart` with legacy fallback support.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
* [#6744](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6744): fix(app-core): use /api/agent/restart with legacy fallback
* [#6743](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6743): chore(api): add plugin state drift diagnostics
* [#6738](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6738): chore(deps): bump npm_and_yarn group (3 updates)
* [#6733](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6733): feat: pipeline hooks
* [#6732](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6732): chore(deps): bump rustls-webpki (cargo)
* [#6731](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6731): chore(deps): bump npm_and_yarn group (4 updates)
* [#6730](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6730): chore(deps): bump rand (cargo)
* [#6729](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6729): chore(deps): bump uv group (22 updates)

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Release Workflow Failures**
* Resolved multiple release failures (v2.0.0-alpha.140 through v2.0.0-alpha.150) caused by build and package publishing blockers. Issues: [#6734](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6734), [#6735](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6735), [#6736](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6736), [#6737](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6737), [#6739](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6739), [#6740](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6740), [#6741](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6741), [#6742](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6742), [#6745](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6745), [#6746](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6746).

**Concurrency and Race Condition Issues**
* Resolved issues related to concurrent NPM release jobs causing non-fast-forward push failures and duplicate issue reports for v2.0.0-alpha.156 and v2.0.0-alpha.160. Issues: [#6747](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6747), [#6748](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6748), [#6749](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6749), [#6750](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6750), [#6751](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6751), [#6752](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6752), [#6753](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6753), [#6754](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6754), [#6755](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6755).

## NEW ISSUES

**Release Pipeline Errors**
* [#6756](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6756): Release Failed: v2.0.0-alpha.160
* [#6757](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6757): Release Failed: v2.0.0-alpha.162

## ACTIVE ISSUES
* None.
